stonetop.summary: A cursed goatherder turned Boss's enforcer, kept sauced until there's killing to do.

system.concept: A cursed goatherder turned Boss's enforcer, kept sauced until there's killing to do.
system.description: A goatherder from north of Barrier Pass, with orange irises and too-long fingers — marks of the Howling Curse. She turned up in Gordin's Delve years back, and one of the Bosses put her to work as an enforcer. They keep her sauced and happy until there's work to be done; then they dry her out, point out the target, and stand well back.
